import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import "../index.css"; function Landing() { const [scrolled, setScrolled] = useState(false); useEffect(() => { const handleScroll = () => { setScrolled(window.scrollY > 50); }; window.addEventListener("scroll", handleScroll); return () => window.removeEventListener("scroll", handleScroll); }, []); const features = [ { id: "threat-detection", icon: "M13 10V3L4 14h7v7l9-11h-7z", title: "AI Threat Detection", shortDesc: "Machine learning-powered anomaly detection using Isolation Forest algorithms", description: "Our advanced AI-driven threat detection system uses sophisticated machine learning algorithms to identify and respond to security threats in real-time. The Isolation Forest algorithm continuously analyzes user behavior, network traffic, and system logs to detect anomalies before they become security incidents.", benefits: [ "Real-time behavioral anomaly detection", "Predictive threat modeling based on global intelligence", "Autonomous incident containment (<100ms response)", "Continuous model training with federated learning" ], color: "#4f46e5", gradient: "from-violet-600 to-indigo-600" }, { id: "zero-trust", icon: "M9 12l2 2 4-4m5.618-4.016A11.955 11.955 0 0112 2.944a11.955 11.955 0 01-8.618 3.04A12.02 12.02 0 003 9c0 5.591 3.824 10.29 9 11.622 5.176-1.332 9-6.03 9-11.622 0-1.042-.133-2.052-.382-3.016z", title: "Zero-Trust Architecture", shortDesc: "Never trust, always verify - every request authenticated", description: "Implement a comprehensive Zero-Trust security model that verifies every request, regardless of origin. Our platform provides micro-segmentation, just-in-time access, and continuous verification throughout the entire session lifecycle.", benefits: [ "Never trust, always verify approach", "Micro-segmentation with software-defined perimeters", "Just-in-Time (JIT) and Just-Enough-Access (JEA)", "Continuous verification throughout session", "Real-time Behavioral Biometrics" ], color: "#06b6d4", gradient: "from-cyan-500 to-blue-500" }, { id: "blockchain-audit", icon: "M19 11H5m14 0a2 2 0 012 2v6a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2v-6a2 2 0 012-2m14 0V9a2 2 0 00-2-2M5 11V9a2 2 0 012-2m0 0V5a2 2 0 012-2h6a2 2 0 012 2v2M7 7h10", title: "Blockchain Audit Trail", shortDesc: "Immutable audit logs using blockchain technology", description: "Secure your compliance requirements with blockchain-verified audit trails. Every action, every access, and every change is recorded in an immutable ledger that cannot be tampered with, providing cryptographic proof of data integrity.", benefits: [ "Immutable audit logs with blockchain verification", "Tamper-proof compliance reporting", "Cryptographic proof of data integrity", "Full traceability of all system actions" ], color: "#10b981", gradient: "from-emerald-500 to-teal-500" }, { id: "quantum-crypto", icon: "M20 7l-8-4-8 4m16 0l-8 4m8-4v10l-8 4m0-10L4 7m8 4v10M4 7v10l8 4", title: "Quantum-Resistant Cryptography", shortDesc: "Post-quantum cryptographic algorithms for future-proof security", description: "Prepare for the quantum computing era with our advanced quantum-resistant cryptography. We implement ML-KEM, SLH-DSA, and hybrid classical + quantum-resistant encryption to protect your data against both current and future threats.", benefits: [ "Post-quantum cryptographic algorithms (ML-KEM, SLH-DSA)", "Hybrid classical + quantum-resistant encryption", "Automated key rotation with quantum RNG", "Future-proof your security infrastructure" ], color: "#8b5cf6", gradient: "from-purple-500 to-violet-600" }, { id: "soar", icon: "M9 3v2m6-2v2M9 19v2m6-2v2M5 9H3m2 6H3m18-6h-2m2 6h-2M7 19h10a2 2 0 002-2V7a2 2 0 00-2-2H7a2 2 0 00-2 2v10a2 2 0 002 2zM9 9h6v6H9V9z", title: "SOAR & Playbooks", shortDesc: "Automated security orchestration and response playbooks", description: "Automate your incident response with our Security Orchestration, Automation, and Response (SOAR) platform. Create customizable playbooks that automatically contain threats, coordinate responses across tools, and learn from every incident.", benefits: [ "Playbook-driven incident response", "Automated threat containment", "Integration with 500+ security tools", "Autonomous Security Agents", "Custom workflow automation" ], color: "#f59e0b", gradient: "from-amber-500 to-orange-500" }, { id: "compliance", icon: "M9 12l2 2 4-4m6 2a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z", title: "Compliance Monitoring", shortDesc: "Real-time compliance scanning and automated regulatory reporting", description: "Stay compliant with automated monitoring for SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR, HIPAA, and more. Our platform continuously scans your infrastructure and generates comprehensive compliance reports with actionable remediation steps.", benefits: [ "Real-time compliance scanning", "Automated regulatory reporting", "SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR, HIPAA support", "Continuous compliance posture management", "Automated evidence collection" ], color: "#ef4444", gradient: "from-red-500 to-rose-600" }, { id: "privacy-ml", icon: "M9.663 17h4.673M12 3v1m6.364 1.636l-.707.707M21 12h-1M4 12H3m3.343-5.657l-.707-.707m2.828 9.9a5 5 0 117.072 0l-.548.547A3.374 3.374 0 0014 18.469V19a2 2 0 11-4 0v-.531c0-.895-.356-1.754-.988-2.386l-.548-.547z", title: "Privacy-Preserving ML", shortDesc: "Federated learning and differential privacy for secure AI", description: "Train powerful AI models without compromising user privacy. Our privacy-preserving machine learning framework uses federated learning and differential privacy to derive insights from distributed data sources while keeping data localized.", benefits: [ "Federated learning for distributed model training", "Differential privacy implementation", "AI Security Copilot for natural language queries", "Data remains localized during training", "GDPR-compliant AI analytics" ], color: "#ec4899", gradient: "from-pink-500 to-rose-500" }, { id: "web3-identity", icon: "M17 9V7a2 2 0 00-2-2H5a2 2 0 00-2 2v6a2 2 0 002 2h2m2 4h10a2 2 0 002-2v-6a2 2 0 00-2-2H9a2 2 0 00-2 2v6a2 2 0 002 2zm7-5a2 2 0 11-4 0 2 2 0 014 0zM7 17a2 2 0 100-4 2 2 0 000 4z", title: "Web3 Identity", shortDesc: "Decentralized identity and wallet-based authentication", description: "Embrace the future of identity with Web3-compatible decentralized identity management. Support for DIDs, wallet-based authentication, and verifiable credentials provides secure, user-controlled identity verification.", benefits: [ "Decentralized Identity (DID) management", "Wallet-based authentication", "Verifiable Credentials (VC)", "Self-sovereign identity control", "Cross-platform identity verification" ], color: "#14b8a6", gradient: "from-teal-500 to-cyan-500" }, { id: "rasp", icon: "M12 15v2m-6 4h12a2 2 0 002-2v-6a2 2 0 00-2-2H6a2 2 0 00-2 2v6a2 2 0 002 2zm10-10V7a4 4 0 00-8 0v4h8z", title: "RASP Protection", shortDesc: "Runtime Application Self-Protection for application security", description: "Protect your applications from within with Runtime Application Self-Protection (RASP). Our solution monitors application behavior in real-time, detects attacks, and takes immediate action to neutralize threats without manual intervention.", benefits: [ "In-app threat detection and prevention", "Real-time application behavior monitoring", "Automatic attack neutralization", "Zero-day vulnerability protection", "Minimal performance impact" ], color: "#f97316", gradient: "from-orange-500 to-red-500" }, { id: "deceptive-security", icon: "M15 12a3 3 0 11-6 0 3 3 0 016 0z M2.458 12C3.732 7.943 7.523 5 12 5c4.478 0 8.268 2.943 9.542 7-1.274 4.057-5.064 7-9.542 7-4.477 0-8.268-2.943-9.542-7z", title: "Deceptive Security", shortDesc: "Advanced honeypots and deception technology", description: "Turn the tables on attackers with our deceptive security platform. Deploy intelligent honeypots, breadcrumbs, and lures that detect intruders early and gather intelligence on attack techniques.", benefits: [ "Intelligent honeypot deployment", "Early intruder detection", "Attack technique intelligence gathering", "Dynamic deception environments", "Zero false positives" ], color: "#dc2626", gradient: "from-red-600 to-pink-600" }, { id: "confidential-computing", icon: "M10 20l4-16m4 4l4 4-4 4M6 16l-4-4 4-4", title: "Confidential Computing", shortDesc: "Secure enclaves for protected data processing", description: "Process your most sensitive data in hardware-secured enclaves. Our confidential computing platform ensures that data remains encrypted during processing, protecting it from insider threats, firmware attacks, and cloud provider access.", benefits: [ "Hardware-secured enclaves (SGX, SEV)", "Data encrypted during processing", "Protection from insider threats", "Secure multi-party computation", "Cloud-agnostic deployment" ], color: "#3b82f6", gradient: "from-blue-500 to-indigo-600" }, { id: "sbom", icon: "M9 5H7a2 2 0 00-2 2v12a2 2 0 002 2h10a2 2 0 002-2V7a2 2 0 00-2-2h-2M9 5a2 2 0 002 2h2a2 2 0 002-2M9 5a2 2 0 012-2h2a2 2 0 012 2m-3 7h3m-3 4h3m-6-4h.01M9 16h.01", title: "SBOM Management", shortDesc: "Software Bill of Materials for complete visibility", description: "Maintain complete visibility into your software supply chain with comprehensive SBOM management. Track all components, dependencies, and vulnerabilities across your entire application portfolio.", benefits: [ "Complete component inventory", "Vulnerability tracking across dependencies", "Software supply chain security", "Automated license compliance", "Real-time vulnerability alerts" ], color: "#6366f1", gradient: "from-indigo-500 to-purple-600" }, { id: "cloud-audits", icon: "M3 10h18M7 15h1m4 0h1m-7 4h12a3 3 0 003-3V8a3 3 0 00-3-3H6a3 3 0 00-3 3v8a3 3 0 003 3z", title: "Cloud Security Audits", shortDesc: "Automated comprehensive cloud infrastructure checks", description: "Automate your cloud security posture management with comprehensive audits. Check S3 buckets, IAM roles, KMS encryption, VPC configurations, and more across AWS, Azure, and GCP environments.", benefits: [ "Automated S3 bucket permission checks", "IAM role and policy analysis", "KMS encryption status verification", "CloudTrail logging verification", "Multi-cloud support (AWS, Azure, GCP)" ], color: "#0ea5e9", gradient: "from-sky-500 to-blue-600" }, { id: "real-time-monitoring", icon: "M9 19v-6a2 2 0 00-2-2H5a2 2 0 00-2 2v6a2 2 0 002 2h2a2 2 0 002-2zm0 0V9a2 2 0 012-2h2a2 2 0 012 2v10m-6 0a2 2 0 002 2h2a2 2 0 002-2m0 0V5a2 2 0 012-2h2a2 2 0 012 2v14a2 2 0 01-2 2h-2a2 2 0 01-2-2z", title: "Real-Time Monitoring", shortDesc: "Instant alerts and live dashboard updates via WebSocket", description: "Stay ahead of threats with real-time monitoring and instant alerts. Our WebSocket-powered platform delivers live updates, enabling immediate threat response and comprehensive security visibility.", benefits: [ "Instant alerts via WebSocket connections", "Live dashboard updates", "Real-time incident management", "Custom alert thresholds", "Integration with SIEM systems" ], color: "#22c55e", gradient: "from-green-500 to-emerald-600" } ]; const stats = [ { value: "99.9%", label: "Uptime SLA" }, { value: "500+", label: "Security Checks" }, { value: "24/7", label: "Monitoring" }, { value: "<100ms", label: "Response Time" }, ]; const testimonials = [ { name: "Sarah Chen", role: "CISO, TechCorp", content: "CyberShield transformed our security posture. The AI-driven detection caught threats we would have missed, and the automated response saved us countless hours.", avatar: "SC" }, { name: "Michael Roberts", role: "VP Engineering, CloudFirst", content: "The automated cloud audits and compliance monitoring are game-changers. Now we have complete visibility into our multi-cloud environment.", avatar: "MR" }, { name: "Emily Watson", role: "Security Lead, DataSecure", content: "Real-time alerts and incident management have reduced our response time by 70%. The zero-trust implementation was seamless.", avatar: "EW" } ]; return (
